productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Force 1 '07 White Casual Shoe
description: A perfect sneaker for those who never compromise on sporty style and comfort, the Air Force 1'07 shoe from nike comes in a sleek design. Team it with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper · Synthetic upper for protection and durability · Perforations on the forefoot and midfoot for breathability · Lace-ups for a snug, customised Fit · Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort · Appliqued logo on the sides · Brand tab appliqued on the tongue and embroidered behind the collar Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort with an Airsole in the heel for better impact protection Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorption Outsole · Durable rubber outsole with pivot points and circular grooves for greater grip and easy 180 degree movement of the foot shoe care Remove dust and dirt with damp clean cloth Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
